title: Kasai Foods
description: Replaces all food items in Minecraft with KasaiSora-themed ones.
body:
![Kasai FOOD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4PLdmciJ/images/91d93875810eb8a93e556270980e3a11873c0cc1.png) **The Kasai Food resource pack will change all the food items in Minecraft into [KasaiSora](https://www.youtube.com/@KasaiSora) themed onces.** ## WHY DOWNLOAD THE PACK? Do you want your food to look like KasaiSora? Then you are at the right place! Using this pack, very food item is changed into a KasaiSora version of that food. ## WHAT DOES THE PACK CHANGE? _This resource pack has a custom KasaiSora-themed texture of the following items:_ Apple, Baked Potato, Beef, Beetroot, Bread, Carrot, Raw Chicken, Chorus Fruit, Cod, Cooked Beef, Cooked Chicken, Cooked Cod, Cooked Mutton, Cooked Porkchop, Cooked Rabbit, Cooked Salmon, Cookie, Dried Kelp, Glow Berries, Golden Apple, Golden Carrot, Melon Slice, Milk Bukkit, Mushroom Stew, Mutton, Poisonous Potato, Porkchop, Potato, Pufferfish, Pumpkin pie, Rabbit, Rabbit Stew, Rotten_flesh, Salmon, Spider Eye, Suspicious Stew, Sweet Berries, Tropical Fish
DISCLAIMER It does not change a Melon Block or any other food block. This will be added in the future
# Support / Credits [](https://membercat.com) This project is part of **Membercat Studios** by KasaiSora and has been created by: - **bug_finder**: Artist - **Ali**: made logo and banner To report an issue, receive support, or give your feedback, join our [Discord Server](https://dc.kasai.gg).
